title: Power BI Time Intelligence DAX — MoM, QoQ, YoY, Rolling Windows, Missing Periods

confirmed_facts.fact: All time intelligence DAX functions require a date table marked as a Date Table (Table Tools > Mark as date table) with a contiguous Date column covering full calendar years. Without this, PREVIOUSMONTH/TOTALYTD/SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR return errors or wrong results.

PREVIOUSMONTH returns ALL dates in the previous calendar month relative to the last date in the current filter context. DATEADD(-1, MONTH) is equivalent. In a matrix with months as columns, each column's filter context gives the correct previous month automatically.

SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR shifts the entire current filter context back exactly 1 year (March 2026 → March 2025). PREVIOUSYEAR returns ALL dates in the prior calendar year (Jan 1 – Dec 31). Use SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR for month-by-month YoY columns.
DATESINPERIOD(dates, startDate, -N, MONTH) creates a rolling window of N months ending at startDate. Anchor with LASTDATE('DateTable'[Date]) for the current filter context's last date.
LASTNONBLANK(dates, expression) returns the last date where the expression is non-blank — use for carry-forward when a month has no snapshot data.
Time intelligence functions only work in CALCULATE modifier position, not in row context (inside SUMX or FILTER iterators). Move them to CALCULATE.

implementation_notes:
MoM (Month-over-Month) measures:
```dax
// Base measure
VulnCount = SUM(SecuritySnapshots[Value])

// Previous month
VulnCount PM = CALCULATE([VulnCount], PREVIOUSMONTH('DateTable'[Date]))
// Or equivalently: CALCULATE([VulnCount], DATEADD('DateTable'[Date], -1, MONTH))

// Absolute change
MoM Change =
    VAR _Current = [VulnCount]
    VAR _Prior   = [VulnCount PM]
    RETURN IF(NOT ISBLANK(_Current) && NOT ISBLANK(_Prior), _Current - _Prior, BLANK())

// Percent change (ABS in denominator handles negative values)
MoM Change % =
    VAR _Current = [VulnCount]
    VAR _Prior   = [VulnCount PM]
    RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_Prior) || _Prior = 0, BLANK(), DIVIDE(_Current - _Prior, ABS(_Prior)))

// Direction flag for conditional formatting icons
MoM Direction =
    VAR _Chg = [MoM Change]
    RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_Chg), BLANK(), IF(_Chg > 0, 1, IF(_Chg < 0, -1, 0)))
```

QoQ (Quarter-over-Quarter) measures:
```dax
VulnCount PQ = CALCULATE([VulnCount], PREVIOUSQUARTER('DateTable'[Date]))
// Or: CALCULATE([VulnCount], DATEADD('DateTable'[Date], -1, QUARTER))

QoQ Change % =
    VAR _Current = [VulnCount]
    VAR _Prior   = [VulnCount PQ]
    RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_Prior) || _Prior = 0, BLANK(), DIVIDE(_Current - _Prior, ABS(_Prior)))
```

YoY (Year-over-Year) measures:
```dax
VulnCount LY = CALCULATE([VulnCount], SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR('DateTable'[Date]))

YoY Change % =
    VAR _Current = [VulnCount]
    VAR _LY      = [VulnCount LY]
    RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_LY) || _LY = 0, BLANK(), DIVIDE(_Current - _LY, ABS(_LY)))
```

Rolling window measures:
```dax
// Last 3 months
VulnCount L3M = CALCULATE([VulnCount],
    DATESINPERIOD('DateTable'[Date], LASTDATE('DateTable'[Date]), -3, MONTH))

// Last 12 months
VulnCount L12M = CALCULATE([VulnCount],
    DATESINPERIOD('DateTable'[Date], LASTDATE('DateTable'[Date]), -12, MONTH))

// 3-month rolling average
VulnCount 3M Avg =
    VAR _Window = DATESINPERIOD('DateTable'[Date], LASTDATE('DateTable'[Date]), -3, MONTH)
    VAR _Sum    = CALCULATE(SUM(SecuritySnapshots[Value]), _Window)
    VAR _Count  = CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('DateTable'[MonthSort]), _Window, NOT ISBLANK([VulnCount]))
    RETURN IF(_Count > 0, DIVIDE(_Sum, _Count), BLANK())
```

Missing period handling:
```dax
// Carry-forward: show last known value when current month has no data
VulnCount CarryForward =
    VAR _LastDate = CALCULATE(
        LASTNONBLANK('DateTable'[Date], [VulnCount]),
        FILTER(ALL('DateTable'), 'DateTable'[Date] <= MAX('DateTable'[Date])))
    RETURN CALCULATE([VulnCount], 'DateTable'[Date] = _LastDate)

// Simple: substitute 0 for blank
VulnCount Or Zero = COALESCE([VulnCount], 0)

// Detect missing periods (diagnostic)
HasData = IF(ISBLANK([VulnCount]), "Missing", "Present")
```

Guidance: use BLANK() (not 0) for missing months in trend charts — gaps are visible and honest. Use COALESCE with 0 only in KPI cards where blank looks broken.

Multi-metric pattern with MetricDim:
```dax
// One base measure works for ALL metrics when MetricDim[MetricName] is on rows:
Metric Value = SUM(SecuritySnapshots[Value])

// MoM for ALL metrics in one measure:
Metric MoM % =
    VAR _Current = [Metric Value]
    VAR _Prior   = CALCULATE([Metric Value], PREVIOUSMONTH('DateTable'[Date]))
    RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_Prior) || _Prior = 0, BLANK(), DIVIDE(_Current - _Prior, ABS(_Prior)))

// Put MetricName on matrix rows, MonthYear on columns — both measures adapt automatically
```
caveats: Using PREVIOUSMONTH without a marked date table always returns BLANK()
Time intelligence functions only work in CALCULATE modifier position, not inside SUMX/FILTER iterators
Always check || _Prior = 0 in DIVIDE guard to avoid division by zero
Use ABS(denominator) when the metric can be negative to get correct percentage direction
PREVIOUSYEAR returns the entire prior year — use SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR for month-by-month YoY columns
DATESINPERIOD anchor is LASTDATE of the context (not the start) — for '3 months ending current', anchor is last day of current month
BLANK() returns in trend charts cause line breaks — decide consciously whether gaps or zeros are correct per metric
Confusing PREVIOUSYEAR (full prior year) with SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR (same period shifted 1 year) is the most common YoY mistake
